title: Metric Alias Table — Multiple Names with Primary Selection
story: As a data analyst, I want to manage multiple names and abbreviations for each metric and designate one as primary, so that I can capture all known variations while maintaining a single canonical display name.
description:
Introduces an Alias system for metrics where every metric name is stored as an alias rather than a fixed name on the metric record. The primary alias is used as the display name throughout the application.

The data model abstracts the metric name away from the metrics table into a dedicated Alias table. Each metric can have multiple aliases (names, abbreviations, legacy names), and one alias is flagged as `is_primary` to determine the display name. Users can swap the primary alias at any time, enabling smooth change management as business terminology evolves.

When a new metric is created, its initial name is automatically added as the first alias and marked as primary. Users manage aliases through a DataTable interface within the metric detail panel, with add, edit, delete, and mark-as-primary actions. Changing the primary alias immediately updates the metric name shown in the main glossary table.
acceptance_criteria: Each metric can have multiple aliases stored in a dedicated Alias table
One alias per metric is flagged as primary and used as the display name in the glossary table
Creating a new metric automatically adds the metric name as the first primary alias
User can add, edit, and delete aliases from the metric detail panel
User can mark any alias as primary using a radio button, replacing the current primary
Changing the primary alias immediately updates the metric name in the main data table
Aliases are scoped to the tenant — each tenant manages their own alias values
ux_changes: Adds an Aliases section to the metric detail panel with a DataTable showing all aliases and a radio button column for primary selection. Add/edit/delete actions for alias management. Main glossary table displays the primary alias as the metric name.
middleware_changes: New alias CRUD service with primary-swap logic. When a new metric is created, the service auto-creates the initial alias record. Lookup logic resolves the primary alias for display.
data_model_changes: New Alias table with columns for alias text, metric foreign key, tenant scope, and is_primary boolean flag. Metric name is no longer stored on the metrics table directly — it is resolved from the primary alias.
api_changes: CRUD endpoints for alias management. PUT endpoint for marking an alias as primary. GET endpoint returns the resolved primary alias as part of metric data.
implementation_notes: Switched from Handsontable to DataTable for alias management because radio button interactions were not functional in Handsontable. The is_primary flag uses a radio-button pattern — setting one alias as primary automatically unsets the previous primary.
comment_summary: Developer switched from Handsontable to DataTable due to radio button limitations. Implementation auto-creates an alias when a new metric is added and reflects primary alias changes in the main glossary table. Approved after review.
